directors.name: Michael C. Arnold
directors.bio_summary: Former President and CEO of Ryerson Inc., where he led the company through its IPO in 2014. Previously held various senior management positions at The Timken Company from 1979 to 2010, including Executive Vice President. He serves as Lead Independent Director of Kaiser Aluminum Corporation.

directors.name: Sondra L. Barbour
directors.bio_summary: Former Executive Vice President of Information Systems & Global Solutions at Lockheed Martin Corporation, where she spent 30 years in various leadership roles including Chief Information Officer and VP of Corporate Internal Audit. She also served briefly as Executive Vice President of Leidos Holdings, Inc. She currently serves on the Board of Directors of Nisource, Inc.

directors.name: Suzanne P. Clark
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of the U.S. Chamber of Commerce since March 2021, having previously served as its President and Chief Operating Officer. She also previously led Potomac Research Group and served as President of the National Journal Group at Atlantic Media Company. She serves on the Board of Directors of TransUnion as Chair of the Risk and Compliance Committee.

directors.name: Bob De Lange
directors.bio_summary: Group President, Services, Distribution and Digital at Caterpillar Inc., responsible for management of the Caterpillar brand and distribution network. He has held various leadership positions at Caterpillar since joining in 1993, including Group President of Construction Industries.

directors.name: Eric P. Hansotia
directors.bio_summary: Chairman, President and CEO of AGCO since January 2021, having previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. Prior to joining AGCO, he held several positions at John Deere including Senior Vice President, Global Harvesting. He serves on the Board of Directors of Toro Co.

directors.name: George E. Minnich
directors.bio_summary: Former Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of ITT Corporation from 2005 to 2007, and previously held senior finance positions at United Technologies Corporation including CFO of Otis Elevator and CFO of Carrier Corporation. He also served as an audit partner at Price Waterhouse (now PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP) from 1984 to 1993.

directors.name: Niels Pörksen
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer at Südzucker AG since 2020, one of the world's largest sugar producers based in Germany. He previously served as a Group Executive at Nufarm and held various leadership positions at BASF across multiple countries, as well as serving on the Executive Board of Nordzucker.

directors.name: David Sagehorn
directors.bio_summary: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Oshkosh Corporation, where he served for 13 years. He also held various management positions at Oshkosh from 2000 to 2007 including Vice President and Treasurer and Vice President of Business Development. He serves on the Board of Directors of Chart Industries, Inc. as Chair of the Audit Committee.

directors.name: Mallika Srinivasan
directors.bio_summary: Chairman of Tractors and Farm Equipment Limited (TAFE), the second largest agricultural tractor manufacturer in India, since December 2019, having held various positions at TAFE since 1986. She is also Chairperson of the Indian Government's Public Enterprises Selection Board and a Core Member of the BRICS Women's Alliance.

directors.name: Matthew Tsien
directors.bio_summary: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer of General Motors, where he spent a 40-year career in various leadership roles including President of GM China. He retired recently from General Motors and currently serves as a Director of Magna International since May 2023.

extraction_notes: The proxy text provided covered only the director nominee section and committee membership details. No separate executive officers section was included in the provided text. Niels Pörksen's name appears as 'NIELS P RKSEN' in the source (likely a rendering issue with the ö character). Tenure years were calculated based on the stated 'Director since' year relative to 2024. Ms. Srinivasan is noted as non-independent due to TAFE's commercial relationships with AGCO. The Audit Committee chair role is assigned to Sondra L. Barbour based on the committee listing. Eric P. Hansotia is listed as Chair of the Executive Committee and holds the Chairman/President/CEO role, normalized to 'chair'.
